the three important Yogas caused by the planets occupying the second
and the 12111 signs counted from Moon.
51. 1. 1r one. two or more of the five planets. Mars. Mercury, Jupiter,
Venus or Saturn (excepting Sun and Moon the two kJminaries)
are in 2 or 12 or in both the houses from the moon Sign whatever
be the sign, Sunapha. Anapha and Ohurdhura Yogas are formed
respectively.
One can find out Sunapha Yoga by the planet in the second
house counted from the Moon sign. Anapha is caused by the
~anet in 12 to Moon; and Dhurdhura Yoga by the planets both
in 2 and 12 to Moon. In a horoscope only one of the three
Yogas wil be formed (or neither Sunapha nor Anapha nor both).
51. 2. I r these three Yogas are not formed then it is called 'KemMiroma
Yoga: But if Moon or any planet is not in a Kendra to Lagna and
if Moon does not have aspect from any planet then Kemadruma
Yoga of the worst type is formed.
Note some consider that Anupha Yoga is formed by Mars or
